params.name: UNCRC
params.description:
On Nov 17, 1979 AD, the Human Rights Council of the United Nations started drafting the Convention on the Rights of Children.
As the first international convention on children's rights that is legally binding, the Convention on the Rights of Children brings attention to at-risk children all around the world and pushes the world to design legislation to protect them. Removing prejudice, maximizing the interest of children, protecting their survival and development, and respecting their opinion …
